t2c_instance_id_39756.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'Speed' RETURN p.name AS producer, COUNT(m) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 3

t2c_instance_id_27401.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person {name: "Brad Pitt"})-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfMoviesBradPittActedIn

t2c_instance_id_23369.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born < 1960 RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, m.released AS ReleaseYear

t2c_instance_id_36307.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born > 1960 RETURN m LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_23311.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(:Movie) RETURN p.name, p.born ORDER BY p.born ASC LIMIT 3

t2c_instance_id_27462.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[a:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) RETURN p.name, COUNT(m) AS movies_count ORDER BY movies_count DESC LIMIT 1

t2c_instance_id_33013.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title, p.born ORDER BY p.born ASC LIMIT 1

t2c_instance_id_35074.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(p:Person) RETURN m.title AS movie, count(p) AS num_actors ORDER BY num_actors DESC LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_24077.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:WROTE]->(:Movie) WHERE p.born >= 1950 AND p.born <= 1959 RETURN p LIMIT 3

t2c_instance_id_39915.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.released >= 2005 AND m.released <= 2010 AND m.tagline = 'Speed has no limits' RETURN m.title

t2c_instance_id_39814.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born = 1949 RETURN p.name, m.title

t2c_instance_id_32718.gold_cypher: MATCH ()-[:REVIEWED {summary: 'Silly, but fun'}]->(m:Movie) RETURN avg(m.rating) AS average_rating

t2c_instance_id_37513.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Keanu Reeves'})-[r:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie {title: 'The Matrix'}) RETURN p.name AS person, m.title AS movie, r.roles AS roles

t2c_instance_id_27699.gold_cypher: MATCH (keanu:Person {name: "Keanu Reeves"})-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(coActor:Person) RETURN coActor.name AS CoActorName, collect(m.title) AS MovieTitles

t2c_instance_id_37503.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.released >= 1980 AND m.released < 1990 RETURN m.title, m.released

t2c_instance_id_27598.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN|DIRECTED|PRODUCED|WROTE]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.title = "Top Gun" RETURN p.name

t2c_instance_id_32840.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(p:Person) WHERE left(m.title, 1) = left(p.name, 1) RETURN m.title

t2c_instance_id_36305.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'Real World' RETURN m.title, m.tagline

t2c_instance_id_36331.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Speed Racer'})<-[:PRODUCED]-(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS producer ORDER BY p.born DESC LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_40037.gold_cypher: MATCH (director:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(movie:Movie) WHERE director.born >= 1960 AND director.born < 1970 RETURN movie.title AS title, movie.released AS release_year ORDER BY movie.released DESC LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_23669.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'journey' RETURN m LIMIT 3

t2c_instance_id_24000.gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.released > 2005 RETURN d.name, count(m) AS movies_directed ORDER BY movies_directed DESC LIMIT 3

t2c_instance_id_39564.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN p.name AS person, COUNT(r) AS review_count ORDER BY review_count DESC LIMIT 1

t2c_instance_id_38218.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) RETURN p.name AS director, count(m) AS num_movies ORDER BY num_movies DESC LIMIT 1

t2c_instance_id_39927.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN p.name AS reviewer, COUNT(r) AS review_count ORDER BY review_count DESC LIMIT 1

t2c_instance_id_36377.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.released >= 1990 AND m.released < 2000 RETURN m

t2c_instance_id_39846.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born = 1967 RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle ORDER BY m.released LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_37675.gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(p:Person) RETURN a.name AS actor, count(r) AS reviews ORDER BY reviews DESC LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_24123.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN p.name AS reviewer, r.summary AS review_summary, r.rating AS rating ORDER BY r.rating DESC LIMIT 1

t2c_instance_id_40139.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.released = 1999 RETURN p.name AS actor, COUNT(r) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_23325.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.released > 2010 RETURN p.name, m.title, r.roles

t2c_instance_id_24083.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.released < 2000 RETURN m.title, r.roles

t2c_instance_id_34971.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->() RETURN p.name AS name, count(r) AS num_reviews ORDER BY num_reviews DESC LIMIT 5

t2c_instance_id_39958.gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'limits' AND m.released > 2005 RETURN m.title, m.tagline, m.released ORDER BY m.released LIMIT 3

t2c_instance_id_23870.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title AS Movie, r.summary AS Review, r.rating AS Rating ORDER BY r.rating DESC

t2c_instance_id_39535.gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born >= 1960 AND p.born < 1970 RETURN p.name AS DirectorName, p.born AS BirthYear, collect(m.title) AS DirectedMovies
